title: ScytheMace B + D
description: A resource pack for 1.21.5+ that replaces the default mace texture with a scythe, also updates the sprite of your mace based on its enchantments. Doesn't require mods.
body:
This is a simple PvP resource pack that gives your maces unique textures based on their enchantment one texture for an unenchanted mace, one for Breach, and one for Density.

It also replaces the vanilla mace with a clean 16x16 scythe design that stays true to Minecraft’s original vanilla style.

_Notice_: **Huge** credits to **(willstuff1111)** for creating the original files. all rights belong to him.

my textures were inspired by his work.
His resource pack is called **“Breach and Density Mace Pack”** on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/breach-density-mace-skins)

Works fine on Minecraft versions 1.21.5+

This is the first resource pack I’ve ever published, so any support or feedback would mean a lot ❤️
